theme: Lost Heritage Reclaimed - Reconnecting with Cultural Roots

sources.source: Jessica Boling - Korean Adoptee Identity Journey
keyMoments: Kindergarten exercise - couldn't match parents' features, had to lie
Heritage Day kimchi rejection - 'they didn't like my food, so they didn't like me'
Babysitter sending adopted boy back - fear of same fate
First morning in Korea - seeing herself reflected on every TV channel
'Not Korean enough to be Korean, not White enough to be American'
Meeting birth father with unanswered questions
'I am in a much better place now'
themes: Rejecting Korean heritage in teen years

sources.source: Returning to Korea as an Adoptee - Quartz
keyMoments: 'Kept awake by frustration with not understanding Korean' - taught herself at 15
Imposter syndrome: 'You look like them, but you're not really one of them'
Watching families at jjimjilbang - imagining parallel life
Visiting birth city Daejeon alone - 'I'm back! Has anyone missed me?'
Climbing Hallasan - physical metaphor for emotional journey
Crying on plane leaving - 'homesick for a place I had never considered home'
Grandmother only spoke K'iche' in 'private spaces where she felt comfortable and safe'
Confusion as child - why grandmother spoke differently to great aunt than to her
Learning grandmother was told to speak only 'Castellano' to get better jobs
Regret: 'It is a shame that it has taken me until now to realize how I could have learned more effectively when my family's last two fluent speakers were still with us'
Mission statement: 'reclaim the spaces where my ancestors did not feel safe speaking their language'

struggle: Feeling 'not enough' - not Korean enough, not American enough
Fear of rejection and not belonging
breakthrough: Finding community of others like self

keyEmotionalMoments.moment: Kindergarten exercise - couldn't match parents' features
First morning in Korea - seeing herself on every TV channel
Teaching self Korean at 15 - kept awake by frustration
Visiting birth city Daejeon - 'I'm back! Has anyone missed me?'
Crying on plane - homesick for place never considered home
Grandmother only spoke language in private safe spaces
Mission: reclaim spaces where ancestors didn't feel safe

compositeStoryElements.character: Generic character (not based on single real person)
compositeStoryElements.approach: Combine best moments from all 3 sources
compositeStoryElements.differentiation: NOT about balancing two existing cultures (different from Cultural Bridge stories)
